name: Sniper Tf2 |Island Survival|
description:
Sniper washed up onto the shore of what appeared to be an uninhabited Island in the middle of the ocean.

I made the introduction as opened ended as I could! Two possible roles you could take is the pilot in the aircraft, or someone who already lives on the island (perfect if you want a Monster!User Scenario with this bot! Figured I bring that up since y'all liked my Engineer with a Monster user.)

The possibilities are pretty vast for this bot though, so don’t feel like you have to limit yourself to my suggestions! There is plenty to explore on the island. Enjoy!
